audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:S + xem + N]]. Use xem before a film, picture, or program to say what someone watches or looks at.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:S + xem + N]]: Xem is introduced with visual-media and image complements; finer watch/look distinctions remain lexical and contextual.

audienceSections.normal:
#### S + xem + N

Use xem before a film, picture, or program to say what someone watches or looks at. Example: [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh và Nguyễn Gia Bảo ở nhà.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### S + xem + N

Xem is introduced with visual-media and image complements; finer watch/look distinctions remain lexical and contextual. Literal example: [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh và Nguyễn Gia Bảo ở nhà.]]

audienceSections.normal: Xem covers watching moving images and looking at pictures in this block. It is not analyzed as two unrelated senses here.
audienceSections.expert: Xem covers watching moving images and looking at pictures in this block. It is not analyzed as two unrelated senses here. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh và Nguyễn Gia Bảo ở nhà.]] — Nguyễn Minh Anh and Nguyễn Gia Bảo are at home.
- [[grammar:Tối nay, Nguyễn Minh Anh xem phim.]] — Tonight, Nguyễn Minh Anh watches a film.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Gia Bảo xem truyền hình.]] — Nguyễn Gia Bảo watches television.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh xem ảnh.]] — Nguyễn Minh Anh looks at photos.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Gia Bảo xem chương trình.]] — Nguyễn Gia Bảo watches a program.
- [[grammar:Phim rất thú vị.]] — The film is very interesting.
- [[grammar:Màn hình ở phòng.]] — The screen is in the room.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh muốn xem phim.]] — Nguyễn Minh Anh wants to watch the film.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Gia Bảo cũng xem phim.]] — Nguyễn Gia Bảo watches the film too.
breakdown.expert:
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh và Nguyễn Gia Bảo ở nhà.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 1.
- [[grammar:Tối nay, Nguyễn Minh Anh xem phim.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 2.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Gia Bảo xem truyền hình.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 3.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh xem ảnh.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 4.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Gia Bảo xem chương trình.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 5.
- [[grammar:Phim rất thú vị.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 6.
- [[grammar:Màn hình ở phòng.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 7.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Minh Anh muốn xem phim.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 8.
- [[grammar:Nguyễn Gia Bảo cũng xem phim.]] — Literal reading evidence at Narrative > line 9.
